economic_notes: Entente with Hydro-Québec for hydroelectric royalties totaling $24,904,142 over 50 years; $392,253 received in 2020. Multiple economic development limited partnerships including forestry, sawmill, economic development, retail, and telecommunications.
notes: Financial statements are for fiscal year ended March 31, 2020. Combined financial statements include: Fonds d'exploitation, Comité d'Habitation, Collectif de crédit, Fonds de développement économique et communautaire, and Fiducie Mictikw Coria. Twelve entities accounted for by modified equity method (GBEs) including Club Odanak, multiple numbered companies as general partners, and several limited partnerships. Prior year figures restated due to reclassification of Société en commandite Manouane Sipi investment. Unused Health Canada funds of $3,684,084 carried as liability. COVID-19 related: Council obtained 6-month capital payment moratorium on multiple loans (April–September 2020). Contingent liability of $480,000 related to wrongful death lawsuit. OSR calculated as total revenue minus federal and provincial government transfers (SAC + Health Canada + Other federal + Provincial = $28,431,794; however 'Autres' $6,343,352 and 'Autres fédéral' $4,581,019 may include non-government items — OSR computed as total revenue minus SAC + Health Canada + Provincial = $34,833,207 - $23,850,775 = $10,982,432; used SAC+HealthCanada+OtherFederal+Provincial as total government transfers).
